rules: imagery should have high appetite appeal
silo images should be photographed consistently according to packaging or product type
minimize reflections on plastic, foil, and shiny packaging, especially when covering important product information
remove unnecessary stickers not part of package design, such as special promotion stickers or legal declarations
packaging and labels should be presented straight, not angled or crooked
photograph each unique and meaningful side of the product package
for round or irregular shapes, present sides so printed information and graphics are centered and legible
front view is the side with predominant brand and labeling, format, variant, and size/quantity
products should be evenly lit from side to side and top to bottom
exposure and color should correctly represent the item
maintain separation between product and background
clip products onto pure white background, RGB 255/255/255
retouch dirt, dust, fingerprints, damage, blemishes, expiration dates, lot numbers, and sample-only information
lifestyle images should be realistic, professionally lit, and styled appropriately to the item and brand
product being sold should remain the hero of the lifestyle image
packaging should be incorporated into lifestyle images when practical to connect lifestyle images to silo shots
items must display all indicated required images and conditionally required images and meet the minimum image count listed on each page

main_image.label: Main Image
main_image.description: Primary carousel image/hero image for the PDP.

silo_front.label: Silo, Front
silo_front.guidance: Show the product straight-on on a pure white background with dosage, strength, and count legible, and show quantity clearly for multi-packs or primary configuration for devices.
silo_front.recommendation: Add a straight-on front silo image on pure white with dosage, strength, count, quantity, or device configuration clearly legible.

silo_front_clinical.label: Silo, Front
silo_front_clinical.guidance: Show the product straight-on on a pure white background with a clinical, factual presentation and all dosage, count, or size details legible.
silo_front_clinical.recommendation: Add a clinical straight-on front silo image with dosage, count, or size details clearly legible.

silo_front_in_pack.label: Silo, Front, In Pack
silo_front_in_pack.guidance: Show the complete product packaging from a straight-on, front-facing angle. Shoot on white with no shadow or keystoning.
silo_front_in_pack.recommendation: Add a straight-on in-pack front silo image showing the complete packaging clearly on white.

lifestyle_in_use.label: Lifestyle, In-Use
lifestyle_in_use.guidance: Show the product in a realistic, natural setting that reflects everyday use with the product as the focal point and minimal distraction.
lifestyle_in_use.recommendation: Add a lifestyle image showing the product in realistic everyday use with minimal distraction.

dimensions.label: Dimensions
dimensions.recommendation: Add a dimensions graphic showing product size clearly.

feature_graphic.label: Feature Graphic
feature_graphic.guidance: Highlight primary benefits, active ingredients, product features, included contents, usage instructions, or claims using clean and compliant graphic treatment.
feature_graphic.recommendation: Add a clean feature graphic highlighting the primary benefit, feature, active ingredient, included contents, or usage instructions.

clinical_graphic.label: Clinical Graphic
clinical_graphic.guidance: Highlight accuracy, range, or regulatory status using clean callout graphics.
clinical_graphic.recommendation: Add a clinical graphic highlighting accuracy, range, regulatory status, or clinically relevant performance details.

graphic_size_guide.label: Graphic, Size Guide
graphic_size_guide.guidance: Ensure text is large enough to be legible at thumbnail size.
graphic_size_guide.recommendation: Add a size guide graphic with text large enough to be legible at thumbnail size.

graphic_packaging.label: Graphic, Packaging
graphic_packaging.guidance: Provide clear usage guidance using diagrams or step graphics that reference package directions in a clean, informative style.
graphic_packaging.recommendation: Add a packaging/usage guidance graphic with clear step diagrams based on package directions.

graphic_certification.label: Graphic, Certification
graphic_certification.guidance: Display third-party certifications using official logos where licensed, or use a clean badge style for private label.
graphic_certification.recommendation: Add a certification graphic using official logos or clean badge treatment when applicable.

graphic_supplement_fact.label: Graphic, Supplement Fact
graphic_supplement_fact.guidance: Pull the Supplement Facts or Drug Facts panel from packaging flat for legibility and clarity.
graphic_supplement_fact.recommendation: Add a flat Supplement Facts or Drug Facts graphic for ingredient and dosage clarity.

additional_recommendations: Supplement / Drug Facts: Include the Supplement Facts or Drug Facts panel graphic for customers who want ingredient details.
Certification Graphic: Display third-party certifications such as NSF, USP, or FDA-cleared using official logos where licensed.
How-To Usage Graphic: Provide a simple step-by-step visual guide for correct product use or dosing.
Flavor / Form Graphic: Show available flavors, delivery forms such as tablet, gummy, liquid, or strengths in a clean lineup.
Brand Guarantee: Include a brand quality guarantee or money-back guarantee graphic if applicable.
notes: Preserve the repeated feature_graphic slots because the source page shows three separate feature graphics.
Feature graphics cover primary benefit, graphic callouts aligned to label, and available scents, formulas, or variants.
